<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\EventListener; use Psr\Container\ContainerInterface; use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Session\SessionInterface; /** * Sets the session in the request. * * @author Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * @final */ class SessionListener extends AbstractSessionListener { public function __construct( private ?ContainerInterface $container = null, bool $debug = false, array $sessionOptions = [], ) { parent::__construct($container, $debug, $sessionOptions); } protected function getSession(): ?SessionInterface { if ($this->container->has('session_factory')) { return $this->container->get('session_factory')->createSession(); } return null; } }
